title: UK NSC public consultations
body: "The UK National Screening Committee (UK NSC) invites stakeholders and members of the public to take part in consultations on its proposed screening recommendations.  Open (current) consultations  The UK NSC is currently consulting on evidence relating to screening for the conditions listed below.  Type 2 diabetes in adults   To take part in the consultation, click on the grey ‘View documents’ button on the UK NSC’s type 2 diabetes recommendation page. Then submit your response by clicking on the green ‘Submit comments’ button.  The deadline for responses is 11:59pm GMT on 2 March 2026.   Iron deficiency anaemia in pregnancy   To take part in the consultation, click on the grey ‘View documents’ button on the UK NSC’s anaemia recommendation page. Then submit your response by clicking on the green ‘Submit comments’ button.  The deadline for responses is 11:59pm GMT on 24 February 2026.   Prostate cancer   To take part in the consultation, click on the grey ‘View documents’ button on the UK NSC’s prostate cancer recommendation page. Then submit your response by clicking on the green ‘Submit comments’ button.  The deadline for responses is 11:59pm GMT on 20 February 2026.   Intimate partner violence   To take part in the consultation, click on the grey ‘View documents’ button on the UK NSC’s intimate partner violence page. Then submit your response by clicking on the green ‘Submit comments’ button.  The deadline for responses is 11:59pm GMT on 18 February 2026.   Fragile X Syndrome   To take part in the consultation, click on the grey ‘View documents’ button on the UK NSC’s Fragile X recommendation page. Then submit your response by clicking on the green ‘Submit comments’ button.  The deadline for responses is 11:59pm GMT on 16 February 2026.   Bladder cancer   To take part in the consultation, click on the grey ‘View documents’ button on the UK NSC’s bladder cancer recommendation page. Then submit your response by clicking on the green ‘Submit comments’ button.  The deadline for responses is 11:59pm GMT on 9 February 2026.   Cytomegalovirus (CMV)   To take part in the consultation, click on the grey ‘View documents’ button on the UK NSC’s cytomegalovirus recommendation page. Then submit your response by clicking on the green ‘Submit comments’ button.  The deadline for responses is 11:59pm GMT on 6 February 2026.   Antenatal and postnatal mental health conditions   To take part in the consultation, click on the grey ‘View documents’ button on the UK NSC’s antenatal and postnatal mental health conditions recommendation page. Then submit your response by clicking on the green ‘Submit comments’ button.  The deadline for responses is 11:59pm GMT on 4 February 2026.   Outcomes of previous (closed) consultations  Find information on previous consultations on the UK NSC recommendations list. This includes links to supporting documents from the most recent consultation for each condition.  Types of UK NSC consultation  The UK National Screening Committee (UK NSC) runs the following types of public consultations.  Condition recommendation consultations  These relate to whether to screen for a certain condition. They are the most common type of consultation. The UK NSC reviews conditions every 3 years to determine whether it can recommend a screening programme. You...
